meaning: n.磨光,光泽,上光剂,优雅,精良vt.擦亮,发亮,磨光,推敲vi.发亮,变光滑adj.波兰的n.波兰人 Polish 波兰(Poland)的
examples: Her father was a Polish count.
The room smelt strongly of polish.
Can you polish the top of the table?
One of the pair, named as Andrzej S, apologised in court for the offence, Polish media report.
Mr. Lautenberg was the son of Polish and Russian immigrants, according to his Senate website.
